Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Checklist Completed after the execution of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time until SW-Checklist Completed is performed following SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in variants that include a checklist reminder (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to Manuscript Export Succeeded in cases that proceed directly versus those that include Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and Plagiarism Originality Report Completed across different process variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Checklist Completed after SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in submissions that result in SW-EIC Reject versus those that lead to acceptance
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in high-performance variants (performance < 200000 seconds)
Metric: the minimum of the function base < 200000 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Time of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion phase compared to the duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and the end of the case

Name: Total time it takes SW-Checklist Completed to be done after SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in cases involving plagiarism issues (i.e., including Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in variants that bypass immediate rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed or SW-Reviewer Declined)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time for SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion phase in cases that eventually reach SW-Reviewer Agreed versus those that do not
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Minimum time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in multi-round revision cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion grouped by case:concept:name
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'total', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
